LAW AND MOTION 301, EFENDANTS HUDA SHEHADEH AND IKE SHEHADEH DBA IKE'S PLACE MOTION TO VACATE SUMMARY JUDGMENT, STAY OF EXECUTION AND TO RECALL WRIT OF POSSESSION IS DENIED. THE ISSUE ON THIS MOTION IS NOT WHETHER DEFENDANTS' COULD HAVE DEFEATED A MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT WITH A TIMELY OPPOSITION, THE ONLY ISSUE IS WHETHER HAVING FAILED TO FILE ANY OPPOSITION, DEFENDANTS MEET THE EXCUSABLE NEGLECT TEST UNDER C C P 473 B FOR RELIEF FROM THAT FAILURE. DEFENDANTS HAVE PRESENTED NO EVIDENCE GOING TO THAT ISSUE CHOOSING INSTEAD TO FILE DECLARATIONS ADDRESSING THE MERITS OF THE UNDERLYING MOTION. MOREOEVER, DESPITE HAVING CHOSEN THAT STRATEGY DEFENDANTS HAVE NOT ATTACHED ANY THING PURPORTING TO BE A PROPOSED OPPOSITION TO THE MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT WHICH IS AN INDEPENDENT PREREQUISITE TO RELIEF UNDER 473 B. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB

Arlene Helfrich, Esq. and Michael Waughtel, Esq., 415-353-0999 for plaintiff and moving party Dennis Drobisch
Kenneth Fukuda, Esq., 415-571-8880 for defendant and opposing party Ike Shehadeh, Huda Shehadeh and Forever Shehadeh dba Ike's Place

RULING:
ARGUED and the Court modified its tentative ruling as follows --
PLAINTIFF DENNIS DROBISCH'S Ntc And Motion To Fix Amount Of Atty'S Fees Awardable As Costs Under Contract Provision IS DENIED AS TO THE SHEHADEHS FOR LACK OF PRIVITY.
